    Method

    ConsoleRunner.displayAdvancedHospitalStats(Set<Hospital> hospitals)
    Displays advanced operational and distance statistics for all active hospitals

  • Uses of Hospital in pgl.app.algo

    Methods in pgl.app.algo with parameters of type Hospital
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HospitalStats
    AnalyticsEngine.computeHospitalStats(Hospital hospital, List<VictimIncident> incidents)
    Computes comprehensive operational statistics for a given hospital based on assigned incidents.
    static int
    AnalyticsEngine.getIncidentCountForHospital(Hospital hospital, List<VictimIncident> incidents)
    Counts the total number of incidents assigned to a specific hospital.
    Method parameters in pgl.app.algo with type arguments of type Hospital
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DispatchDecision
    DispatchEngine.evaluateBestDispatch(VictimIncident incident, Set<Hospital> hospitals, RoutingEngine routingEngine, List<Triangle> triangles)
    Evaluates all available hospitals to find the optimal dispatch destination for an incident.
    List<VoronoiCell>
    VoronoiEngine.generateVoronoiCells(Set<Hospital> hospitals, List<Triangle> triangles)
    Generates all closed Voronoi cells on the map based on the provided hospitals and Delaunay triangulation.
    List<Triangle>
    DelaunayEngine.triangulate(Set<Hospital> hospitals)
    Computes the Delaunay Triangulation for a given list of hospitals (points)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SidebarController.showHospitalDetails(Hospital hospital)
    Evaluates and formats data regarding a selected hospital, including geospatial analysis metrics such as its bounding Voronoi cell area and historical incident clustering density
